problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: If Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
